hints.intro: Closely inspect the area around the flag
hints.intro_hidden: The next flag is mostly seen by robots?
hints.robots: Maybe the secrets are not that secret after all?
hints.secret: Do these flags all look like Base64 to you? Maybe if you put them all together, you can find something interesting?
hints.console: Would someone put a flag on the window? Maybe you should check
hints.window: I wonder if these flags have a specific Styling on them? Where might you find that out?
hints.css: Time for another decoding! You know the drill by now!
